reason: All major factual claims check out: sugar mice, tearful Ginny reaction, 'You'll do no more murder' line, killing Dolohov, sprinting to Snape's office, and the film's comic/functional register are all confirmed by canon sources. The one slight overstatement is claiming the fireworks/Umbridge resistance is entirely absent from the film - the OOTP film does show Flitwick visibly cheering the Weasley twins' departure, though the specific sarcastic 'authority' line is book-only. The overall score of 71 and the characterization of the film reducing him to a comic background figure is well-supported.
